heading: Adoption of consumer broadband labels
label: 1753 Adoption of consumer broadband labels
notes: References in TextSection 60502(c), referred to in subsec. (b)(2), is , which is set out as a note under .section 60502(c) of Pub. L. 117–58section 1752 of this title

children.heading: Final rule
children.label: a Final rule
children.text: Not later than 1 year after , the Commission shall promulgate regulations to require the display of broadband consumer labels, as described in the Public Notice of the Commission issued on (DA 16–357), to disclose to consumers information regarding broadband internet access service plans.November 15, 2021April 4, 2016

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The broadband consumer label required under subsection (a) shall also include information regarding whether the offered price is an introductory rate and, if so, the price the consumer will be required to pay following the introductory period.

children.heading: Use in broadband data collection
children.label: 2 Use in broadband data collection
children.text: The Commission shall rely on the price information displayed on the broadband consumer label required under subsection (a) for any collection of data relating to the price and subscription rates of each covered broadband internet access service under section 60502(c).
how consumers evaluate broadband internet access service plans; and

whether disclosures to consumers of information regarding broadband internet access service plans, including the disclosures required under section 8.1 of title 47, Code of Federal Regulations, are available, effective, and sufficient.
